query:
SELECT DISTINCT university, major, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM project_matches 
GROUP BY university, major 
ORDER BY MAX(createdAt) DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT DISTINCT university, major, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM project_matches 
GROUP BY university, major 
ORDER BY MAX(createdAt) DESC 
LIMIT 10;
logs: ERROR 3066 (HY000) at line 1: Expression #1 of ORDER BY clause is not in SELECT list, contains aggregate function; this is incompatible with DISTINCT
